secciones.titulo: GVL LIMO - THE UPSTATE'S EXECUTIVE SEDAN, SUV, LIMO SERVICE
secciones.contenido:
NO MATTER WHERE YOU'RE GOING OR HOW YOU NEED TO GET THERE...WE CAN HELP!

AIRPORT RIDES | EXECUTIVE TRANSPORTATION | BIRTHDAY PARTIES | WEDDINGS | EVENTS | GROUP TRANSPORTATION | EARLY MORNING & LATE NIGHT SERVICE | CROSS-COUNTRY TRANSPORTATION | SPORTING EVENTS | PACKAGES AVAILABLE

GREENVILLE | SPARTANBURG | ASHEVILLE | CLEMSON | ANDERSON | SENECA | HIGHLANDS | GREER | HENDERSONVILLE | ATLANTA | CHARLOTTE | LAURENS | TAYLORS | EASLEY | SIMPSONVILLE | DUNCAN | TRAVELERS REST | GREENWOOD | FAIR PLAY & WHEREVER ELSE YOU NEED US!
Herramienta de cotización y reserva integrada. También disponible como app móvil.
Carrusel de reseñas de clientes (contenido dinámico no extraíble sin render JS).

Looking for an affordable and professional limousine rental or executive car/sedan/SUV service in Greenville, South Carolina? Look no further. Give us a call, download our app, or click 'Book Online' today to check availability, rates, and to book! Our rates will surprise you! Airport rides, to trips home to Hilton Head, to Weddings we've got you covered. Our lineup of vehicles is here to serve you with whatever you may need. We are with you every step of the way. As soon as you book, you'll receive a confirmation with your reservation as well as text alerts reminding you about your ride prior to the pickup. You'll also receive an email with the driver's name, photo, cell phone number, and vehicle information prior to pickup to insure we keep you and your passengers safe! Finally, you'll be updated each step of the way through live text alerts when your driver is on the way and when they arrive. GVL Limo is proud to have the nicest fleet in the region with vehicles to suit any occasion! Our party limos/busses are unlike any other and feature WiFi, Karaoke, YoutubeTV, XBOX/Wii Video Game system with Mario Cart, Spotify, up to 50" TV Screens, iPad Controlled Entertainment with Amazon Alexa Voice Control, Phone Chargers, Drinks, Snacks, and Nightclub Style Light and Sound Systems.

Fully Licensed In South Carolina, North Carolina, Georgia, Tennessee, & Anywhere Else In The U.S.
USDOT Number: 3650584
MC Number: 1271873
South Carolina Charter Certificate Number: 9576
South Carolina Charter Bus Certificate Number: 0426
City of Greenville License Number: 47979, 66812

Upon booking a ride, you'll receive a few things from us! (2) Emails - One Confirmation and One Receipt for the 25% non-refundable deposit. As soon as a driver is assigned, you'll receive an email with the driver's photo, cell phone number, vehicle information, and license plate. You'll receive text alerts leading up to the trip and then a message when the driver is on the way and when they have arrived!

Safe Drivers: Drivers Must Have: Background Check (Criminal & Driving Records), Drug Testing, DOT Physicals.

Quality Vehicles: All Vehicles Are Equipped with Video Recording, GPS Tracking, & Speed Monitoring. All Vehicles Are Equipped with 'Stop the Bleed' Emergency kits from our partners at North American Rescue - Drivers undergo training by NAR on proper use. All Vehicles are Fully Insured.

Communication: To maximize safety and efficiency, all drivers carry a radio at all times so they are always accessible, handsfree, and able to communicate with dispatch. Driver's also wear earpieces so this will not disturb your experience.
Carrusel con fotos del equipo (18 miembros, contenido dinámico).

secciones.titulo: GVL LIMO 'SAFE' — SLED Licensed - Executive Protection & Armed Transportation
secciones.contenido: VIP customers, ask about GVL Limo 'SAFE' armed private security options. Ran by ex-law enforcement professionals, GVL Limo is the only company in the State licensed by the South Carolina Law Enforcement Division to provide discrete and effective private secure transportation with concealed armed highly trained details.

CLICK VEHICLE TO LEARN MORE

Vehículos destacados: Q3 (Audi Q3 Compact SUV, 4 pasajeros), Sprinter Limo (Mercedes-Benz 3500 Sprinter, 14 pasajeros), Maserati (Ghibli S, sedán VIP), Escalade (Cadillac Escalade ESV, 6 pasajeros), Limo Party Bus (BCI Falcon Motor-Coach, 45 pasajeros), Lux Bus (Freightliner M2 Grech Mini Coach, 38 pasajeros), Stretch (Chrysler 300 Stretch Limo, 10 pasajeros).

155 Riverplace Suite 206, Greenville, South Carolina 29601, United States

info@gvllimo.com

Feed dinámico de reseñas de clientes en tiempo real.

New to Greenville, visiting, thinking about moving here, or just looking for something fun to do? Ride along with one of our expert drivers and guides and see what GVL has to offer!

Greenville Tours:
- Essential GVL: $130 — Downtown basics (1 hora, hasta 14 personas)
- Essential GVL Plus: $260 — Downtown, Furman University, Travelers Rest, Paris Mountain (2 horas, hasta 14 personas)
- Downtown Cart Tour: $80 — Main Street end-to-end golf cart tour (1 hora, hasta 5 personas)

Seasonal Tours:
- Holiday Lights Tours
- Fall Foliage Tours
- Halloween Package (incluye MADWORLD con boletos con descuento)

Experiences:
- Brewery Tours
- Wine Tours
- Tailgate Packages
- Ghost Tours
- Golf Packages (transporte en CEO Sprinter)
- Range Day Package (entrenamiento con ex-policías)
- Kids Birthday Package (paseo downtown con parada por helado)
- Helicopter Tour (tour aéreo de la ciudad)

Ask about our industrial / commercial site tours! Don't see something you need? Let us know and we'll plan it for you!

secciones.titulo: GREENVILLE'S ONLY CITY APPROVED $5 RIDE CART — DOWNTOWN LIMO CART
secciones.contenido:
Need a quick ride downtown? Give us a call or text us to see if the cart is out.

Capacidad: 5 pasajeros
Costo: $5 por persona
Vehículo eléctrico con horario variable según nivel de carga; se mantiene en/alrededor de Main Street; no puede acceder a vías de más de 35 mph.

Horario típico:
- Mañanas: 11am - 1pm
- Tardes: 4pm - 7 u 8pm
- Noche: 11pm - 3am

Downtown Hospitality Package — Give Your Guests Free Rides!
Dirigido a: hoteles, complejos de apartamentos, restaurantes, negocios downtown.

Planes mensuales:
- 100 Tokens: $400/mes ($1/token de ahorro)
- 50 Tokens: $225/mes ($0.50/token de ahorro)
- 25 Tokens: $120/mes ($0.20/token de ahorro)

Reserva por hora: $200/hr

GVL Limo ha trabajado con la Oficina de Personal Regulatorio del Estado de SC y la Ciudad de Greenville y es el único vehículo de baja velocidad aprobado para transportar pasajeros en el downtown.

GVL LIMO FEATURED ON FOX CAROLINA

secciones.titulo: GVL SAFE — Specialized Armed Executive Protective Transportation
secciones.contenido:
Executive Protection Division

We understand that our principals demands more than just transportation. GVL Limo provides highly trained and certified executive protection specialists who can ensure the safety and security of our clients throughout their journeys.

From Point A to point B - safely

SLED Licensed & Bonded: GVL Limo is the only company in South Carolina currently licensed under SLED (South Carolina Law Enforcement Division) to provide secure armed transportation services. License Number: 4044

Highly Trained: Our drivers and detail personnel are all SLED Licensed as Private Security Agents with Concealed Armed Certifications. We require our personnel have a background in law enforcement, most being ex-police officers. All personnel must go through a rigorous training to go through everything from Weapons Handling, to Vehicle Maneuvering and Performance Driving, to First Aid and Vehicle Concealment. Our training programs are not only tailored to meet South Carolina Law Enforcement Standards, but also are hand crafted by industry professionals from Secret Service members to Navy Seals.

State of The Art Equipment & Technology: GVL Limo not only operates top of the line vehicles but provides its agents with the best equipment available from body armor and communications to firearms and emergency medical supplies. We leverage advanced technology systems to enhance our service quality and efficiency. This includes real-time GPS tracking, secure communication channels, and vehicle monitoring systems.

Personalization and Customization: Personalized service packages tailored to each client's unique needs and preferences. This customization extends to preferred routes, additional security measures, and special requests.

Discreet and Professional Approach: We recognize the importance of confidentiality for our executive clients. Our team maintains the highest level of professionalism, discretion, and confidentiality.

Emergency Medical: All vehicles are equipped with top-of-the-line Crisis Response Kits from North American Rescue. Our security officers are also trained in utilizing the equipment.

Lead Security Officers:
- Eric Baade: Recently retired police sergeant with 26 years of law enforcement experience. Recipient of Distinguished Service Award and Ben Ali Shriners Award for Law Enforcement Excellence.
- Isaac Yopp: 13 years in public service including SC State Trooper, EMT and Firefighter. Two years as firearms instructor. Six years on Civil Emergency Response Team (CERT). Recognized by Governor John R. Kasich for work at 2016 RNC.

33% of CEOs have received physical threats in 2020. VIPs are most at risk when leaving their home and while entering the office. — Center for Protective Intelligence

imagenes.descripcion: Imagen de los oficiales de seguridad Eric Baade e Isaac Yopp

imagenes.descripcion: Foto grupal del equipo de GVL Limo

secciones.contenido:
La empresa se reserva el derecho de rechazar servicio. Los vehículos pueden tener restricciones de millaje. No son responsables por retrasos causados por condiciones fuera de su control (tráfico, clima, problemas mecánicos). Los choferes pueden cancelar viajes si se sienten amenazados, sin reembolso.

No se aceptan contenedores abiertos de alcohol. Uso de drogas ilegales resulta en terminación inmediata sin reembolso. Prohibido ponerse de pie en techos solares. Prohibido fumar en todos los vehículos.

Conductores no pueden exceder la capacidad del vehículo. La empresa no se hace responsable por lesiones de altercados entre pasajeros o intoxicación.

Política de cancelación: Depósito del 25% no reembolsable reserva la fecha. Cancelaciones antes del día anterior al viaje no serán cobradas por el balance restante. Cancelaciones post-facturación no son reembolsables.

5 minutos de gracia antes de cargos por no-show. Servicios por hora que excedan 10+ minutos incurren en cargo de hora adicional.

Vuelos comerciales retrasados (mismo número de vuelo): seguimiento sin cargo adicional. Cancelaciones de vuelo reciben 40% de crédito hacia viajes reprogramados.

Cargos por daños: $375 mínimo por limpieza por enfermedad, $250 por daño electrónico, $150 por robo de dispositivos de entretenimiento, $100 por violación de no-fumar.

Solo se aceptan tarjetas de crédito. No efectivo ni cheques.
